name: memory-quality
description: Audit and clean up Claude Code's auto-saved memories. Scores each memory on 4 dimensions, detects conflicts, and opens a visual health dashboard.

api_key.description: LLM API Key — supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Kimi, MiniMax

provider.description: LLM provider: openai / anthropic / minimax / kimi (leave blank to auto-detect from api_key)

language.description: Interface language: en or zh (default: auto-detect from system locale)
